mnemonics: Pandas is like a Pizza - Data is your Pizza Toppings (Dataframe)
Indexing is like Finding Your Pizza Topping - Use loc and iloc
keyPoints: Dataframe: 2-dimensional labeled data structure with columns of potentially different types
Indexing: loc for label-based indexing, iloc for integer-based indexing
Data merging: concat, join, merge functions
Data cleaning: drop, fill, rename functions
Data transformation: apply, map, transform functions
Data analysis: groupby, pivot, melt functions
